title: Spurious combinational loop warning depending on the name of formal parameter of an empty task

features.name: interface with logic signal
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration with a logic signal member

features.name: module with logic signal and interface instance
features.description: Code should include a module with a logic signal and an interface instance, where the instance name matches a task parameter name that will cause a name collision

features.name: task with virtual interface parameter matching instance name
features.description: Code should include a task with a virtual interface parameter whose name matches an interface instance name in the calling scope
features.snippet:
task automatic bar(virtual I C);
endtask

features.name: task call with dotted interface path
features.description: Code should include a task call passing an interface member via dotted path notation
